g.text: Arranged in 2x3 Unified Pages matching the "Organising Design Systems" Figma Directory Template
Refractive Specularity: Framing Compliance with Physical Glass

WayaX rejects flat, cold block layouts. In regulated financial spaces, trust is visual. The system emulates a real, thick glass lens layer resting over quantitative data tables, providing tactile safety margins and audit-ready scannability.
Sub-pixel Alignment: specularity borders must follow physical 8px grid alignments.
Color Integrity: Swatches must cleanly isolate Success Emerald from Protective Rose.
Audit-Ready Grids: Table rows vertical paddings remain locked at py-4.5 (18px).
Kinetic Micro-feedback: Element states trigger subtle spring translations and shimmers.

This SVG acts as your single source of truth library structure. Each frosted card on this board maps directly to one dedicated page inside the organized Figma library file, ensuring 100% parity between design groups and developers variables.
Outer viewport padding pt-[72px], combined categories rounded-2xl cards p-4.5.
Outer viewport padding pt-[88px], spacious panels p-6, table row paddings py-4.5 px-5.
Specular top reflection edge stroke + ambient high-blur dark backdrop shadows elevation.
Must render as absolute layered overlays above conversational fields.

Strict max-height constraint: Max-height restricted strictly to exactly 3.5 items (exactly 3 questions with a 30% faded hint of the 4th item) to trigger standard scrollability without causing page overflow or layout viewport jumps on mobile.
Hover scroll thumb uses a custom premium frosted glass element (`.glass-scrollbar`).

FAQ Slideout drawers use fixed right alignments starting at `top-[76px]` to sit symmetrically below the floating top bar capsule, with widths constrained to `340px`/`360px` to maintain side alignments without overlapping chat fields.
4. Pattern Guidelines: Green & Red Data Laws
THE EMERALD GREEN DATA LAW (ACTION & GROWTH)

BUY Call Badges: Styled in a green capsule (`bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20`) containing an active green pulsing status indicator dot (`bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse`).
Target Prices: Bold monospaced figures styled in `text-emerald-500` representing target bounds.
Upside Trend tags: Encased in a green capsule alongside a `TrendingUp` icon (e.g. `30%`).
Wealth Metrics: Positive trailing returns, ROE %, ROCE %, and CAGRCAGR growth is styled green.
THE PROTECTIVE ROSE DATA LAW (RISK & PROTECTION)
SHORT Call Badges: Styled in a red capsule (`bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-400 border border-rose-500/20`) containing an active red pulsing status indicator dot (`bg-rose-500 animate-pulse`).
Protective Stop Loss (SL): Bold monospace warning text styled in `text-rose-400` representing critical protection guiding exits.
Leverage Alert warnings: Debt-to-Equity is highlighted red if it surpasses critical boundaries (`Debt/Equity > 1.50`).
Volatility / Risk: Volatility index (30D) or negative return periods are colored red to isolate risk vectors.
• Ensure all table row indices are padded with leading zeros (e.g. 01, 02) and centered.
• Lock bottom answer view snapping coordinates block: 'start' when bot streams bubbles.
• Keep spacing tokens mathematically constrained within 8px/4px base indexes.
• Isolate the expandable table row drawer details using 3-column accordion alignments.
• Do NOT make categories row checkboxes or search Wells overflow vertical viewports.
• Do NOT inject the deprecated Salted Camel (#D5AD76) color stops inside active cards.
• Do NOT allow expandable tables to render without the (.liquid-glass-panel) backing layers.
• Do NOT let custom scrollbar components render without a translucent frosted glass thumb.
FROSTED GLASS STOCK TABLE DRAWING (DESKTOP BLUEPRINT)
Fully Vector Grouped Elements — Scale-Ready for Figma Canvas
"Negative earnings surprise and extensive short builds in futures open interest. Trading well below weekly 200 EMA."
05 // CHAT BOX STOCK TABLE GRID LAWS
Tables compile inside a responsive relative grid with border-collapse.
Strict vertical py-4.5 (18px) cell height and horizontal px-5 (20px).

Index (`w-14` / centered) | Company (`min-w-[220px]`) | Action badge (`w-32`) | Blue Trigger Zone | Target Price monospace | Stop Loss monospace | Upside Trend container | Horizon Tenure | Details capsule.
Dark Hover: hover:bg-white/[0.035] | Active Expanded Row: bg-white/[0.015]
Light Hover: hover:bg-slate-50 | Active Expanded Row: bg-indigo-50/15
Toggling expands a details accordion row. Inside: grid-cols-3 divided into Technical indicator parameters matrix, Fundamental ratios parameters shield, and italics-styled analyst thesis statement.
Viewports <768px instantly collapse row grids into stacked floating card list elements (rounded-2xl, p-4.5) using double-column subgrids to keep metrics readable.
Responsive wrapper containing categories rows and aligned triggers
Ask WayaX about entry zones, stocks to buy...
Give me list of stocks I can buy
Give me list of stocks that can give 10% returns in 30 days
Give me 3 stocks in IT sector I can buy today
Show me Pharma stocks currently in the BUY zone

Sandbox Playground: This column serves as a testing playground area. Developers and designers can duplicate the visual component frames, drag them here, and experiment with customized margin grids or alternate color ratios without affecting the master tokens library.
Frosted Glass Theme Refactoring: Re-aligned the design board itself to use caustics refraction circles, a mathematical background dotted grid pattern, and specular top highlights edges.
Figma Community Sync: Re-arranged the entire visual canvas into a 2x3 grid mapping exactly to the 6 standard directories of the "Organising Design Systems" community template.
Salted Camel Deprecated: Deprecated color hex `#D5AD76` from all color Stops. Gradientstops updated cleanly to a Teal-to-Blue stops config (`#77F2E4` and `#6BB6F3`).
Exact Logo Integration: Re-created the brand symbol to exactly use the 3-layered glass logo underlay refraction blurs and golden insignia image asset.
